query_family_examples: all sibling markets for the World Cup
all sibling markets for the NBA Draft
all sibling markets for the FIFA World Cup
all sibling markets for the 2026 NBA Finals
all sibling markets for the US Presidential Election

steps.purpose: Topic search with --expand (default true) live-walks any Polymarket multi-outcome event hit (marketCount > 2) and merges every sibling market into the hits array. --with-prices resolves Kalshi series shells to top-priced active market. --limit 100 raises the cap so 40+ team World Cup events don't truncate.
steps.failure_modes: topic's force-include pass only catches whole-word title hits; long-tail siblings can still get dropped at the truncation tail. If you suspect a known outcome is missing, switch to the polymarket-siblings seed walk (step 2).

steps.purpose: FALLBACK / coverage check. When topic missed an outcome the user named (`...what about Cambodia?`), walk from any known sibling slug; the response carries every outcome in the parent event independent of FTS ranking.
steps.fallback_for: topic step returned < marketCount sibling markets, or user asked about a specific outcome that didn't appear in the topic result.
steps.failure_modes: If you don't know any sibling slug, search Polymarket's gamma UI conventions: `will-<outcome>-win-the-<year>-<event>` is the dominant slug shape.

steps.purpose: Combine topic.hits[] + polymarket-siblings.markets[] into one deduped list sorted by 24h volume. Drop closed markets unless the user explicitly asked for resolved outcomes.
